evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 36 trades and $1324.4 PnL with median hold near 5 minutes, but owns a -527 MAE tail. Protected extended-VWAP winners have median MAE around -14.45, so a separate pin-avoid route is preferable to global extension blocking.
name: Charm Wall Pin Avoid Dormant Split
risk: The dormant profile may be unreachable, or router matching may cannibalize clean charm-pin/charm-wall winners instead of isolating tails.
trigger: VALID_0DTE high charm-wall or pin-risk state currently routed into charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE, while total net profit remains >=98% of run_001 and protected fast-winner count is not materially reduced.

evidence: pullback_long remains the dominant PnL engine at $2299.7 but owns the current -638.75 worst MAE. Broad static structure filters would remove too much profitable flow and prior pullback re-expansion created catastrophic heat.
name: Pullback Deep-Heat Companion Classifier
risk: Config-only proxies may block profitable weak-structure pullbacks; early-path and profile-aware features are likely needed to separate recoverable heat from traps.
trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entry with weak structure distances, low or negative VWAP acceleration, no early MFE, and delayed recovery behavior.
validation_metric: Retain >=90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -638.75 toward <= -527 and keeping total PnL/exposure hour flat or better.
